title: Roles
roleLibraryDesc: Compare reusable manifests before opening the authoring flow.
emptyLibrary: Create the first role to start shaping your engineering roster.

formDialog.desc: Configure identity, execution limits, inherited behavior, knowledge, and safety controls for this role.
formDialog.name: Name
formDialog.noSkills: No skills configured for this role.

workspace.workspaceDesc: Work through setup, identity, capabilities, knowledge, governance, and review in one structured authoring flow.
workspace.availablePluginsDesc: Pick installed tool plugins for this role and review the functions they expose before adding them to the manifest.
workspace.availablePluginsEmpty: No installed tool plugins discovered yet.
workspace.pluginBindingsDesc: Refine which declared functions from each selected plugin belong to this role.
workspace.advancedCapabilitySettingsDesc: Keep custom capability flags and richer tool host metadata aligned with the YAML source of truth.
workspace.availableSkillsDesc: Use catalog-backed skills when possible, or keep a manual path when the catalog does not contain the reference yet.
workspace.availableSkillsEmpty: No repo-local skills discovered yet. You can still enter a manual skill path.
workspace.mcpServersDesc: Declare named MCP hosts that remain part of the canonical role manifest.
workspace.noSkillsYet: No skills configured for this role yet.
workspace.memorySettingsDesc: These settings stay in the canonical role definition even when the current runtime does not consume them directly.
workspace.triggersDesc: Define lightweight activation cues for this role.
workspace.overrideEditorDesc: Use JSON object syntax for open-ended override rules that should persist to the canonical YAML manifest.
workspace.reviewDesc: Review the right-hand context surfaces before saving. They stay available in desktop rails and can be reopened from compact review panels on smaller viewports.

setup.label: Setup
setup.description: Choose how this role starts, then confirm its reusable identity.

identity.label: Identity
identity.description: Define the role job, persona, language, and response style.

capabilities.label: Capabilities
capabilities.description: Describe packages, tools, skills, and execution limits.

knowledge.label: Knowledge
knowledge.description: Bind repos, docs, patterns, and shared knowledge sources.

governance.label: Governance
governance.description: Set security, collaboration, and trigger expectations.

review.label: Review
review.description: Inspect YAML, summary, preview, and sandbox before saving.

setup.title: Start From The Right Base
setup.summary: Start from a template when most values should carry over. Use inheritance only when the new role is truly a child role.
setup.bullet0: Reuse a template to copy the current draft shape into a new role.
setup.bullet1: Set extends when the role should keep a parent relationship instead of forking the config.
setup.bullet2: Confirm metadata first so later preview and sandbox results are easy to interpret.

identity.title: Align Role, Goal, And Prompt
identity.summary: Identity fields should agree on what the role does, how it behaves, and how it should answer.
identity.bullet0: Fill role title, goal, and system prompt before tuning persona details.
identity.bullet1: Use advanced identity for language, tone, and response style rather than burying those rules in the prompt.
identity.bullet2: If role and prompt disagree, sandbox output becomes harder to trust.

capabilities.title: Model Tools And Skills Explicitly
capabilities.summary: Use packages for reusable capability bundles and skills for explicit knowledge references this role can load.
capabilities.bullet0: Keep allowed tools and external tools readable enough to review before save.
capabilities.bullet1: Use skills to declare opt-in knowledge or workflows that belong to this role.
capabilities.bullet2: Execution limits such as turns or budget should describe guardrails, not hidden surprises.

knowledge.title: Bind The Right Context
knowledge.summary: Knowledge fields should make the role's trusted sources obvious to operators and reviewers.
knowledge.bullet0: List repositories, documents, and patterns that matter to this role.
knowledge.bullet1: Use shared knowledge rows for sources that the role can cite or reuse across runs.
knowledge.bullet2: Prefer concise references over long prompt prose when the knowledge source already exists.

governance.title: Keep Governance Visible
governance.summary: Permission mode, path rules, review requirements, delegation, and triggers should be explicit and reviewable.
governance.bullet0: Use permission and path constraints instead of long negative instructions in the prompt.
governance.bullet1: Add collaboration settings that other operators can explain and maintain.
governance.bullet2: Only add triggers whose activation rule is clear enough to review later.

review.title: Preview Before You Save
review.summary: Inspect the execution summary, YAML, and authoritative preview or sandbox results before persisting the draft.
review.bullet0: Preview resolves the effective manifest and execution profile without calling a model.
review.bullet1: Sandbox reuses the same draft but adds readiness checks and one bounded prompt probe.
review.bullet2: Review the YAML mapping so the structured inputs match the canonical role asset you expect.

error.loadSkills: Failed to load role skill catalog

contextRail.guidanceFor: Focused guidance for the current {section} step.
contextRail.executionSummaryDesc: Review the draft execution intent and governance settings before saving.
contextRail.yamlPreviewDesc: Inspect the current draft as a YAML-oriented manifest before saving.
contextRail.advancedAuthoringDesc: Track advanced role data, inheritance context, and persistence boundaries before you save.
contextRail.storedOnlyFieldsDesc: These sections remain part of the role definition but are not forwarded into today's execution profile.
contextRail.runtimeProjectionDesc: Execution profile consumes runtime-facing role data only. Collaboration, memory, triggers, and overrides remain canonical authoring data.
contextRail.previewAndSandboxDesc: Resolve effective values and optionally run a bounded prompt probe.
contextRail.skillResolutionDesc: Review which skills resolve from the current repository catalog and which remain manual references.
contextRail.skillResolutionNone: No role skills to review yet
